title: GENERAL PROVISIONS
doc_html:
SUBTITLE XI.  THE LOUISIANA LOTTERY CORPORATION LAW

CHAPTER 1.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§9000.  Citation

 This Subtitle shall be referred to as the "Louisiana Lottery Corporation Law".  

Acts 1990, No. 1045, §1, eff. Nov. 7, 1990.
